data.title: Youlife Group Inc. Announces Full Year 2025 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in Shanghai, Youlife Group Inc. (NASDAQ: YOUL), a prominent provider of blue-collar lifetime services in China, disclosed its plans for an earnings conference call. The call aims to discuss the Company's essential operational and financial outcomes.

data.title: TeraWulf Announces Pricing of Upsized Common Stock Offering
data.description: On April 14, 2026, TeraWulf Inc. disclosed the pricing details of its public common stock offering. The Company, listed as WULF on NASDAQ, set the price at $19.00 per share for 47,400,000 shares. This pricing resulted in gross proceeds amounting to around $900 million, an increase from the initial target of $800 million. The Offering is slated to be finalized on April 16, 2026, pending the completion of standard closing requirements.

data.title: Interfor to Announce First Quarter Results on May 14, 2026
data.description: Investors and analysts are invited to join the conference call scheduled for 8:00 a.m. Pacific Time on Friday, May 15, 2026. This call will provide important insights and updates for stakeholders.

data.title: MNA: Baystate Franklin Nurses Vote 98.2% to Authorize a Potential Strike After Filing Unfair Labor Practice Charge to Protect Patient Care
data.description: Nurses at Baystate Franklin Medical Center in GREENFIELD, Mass. made a significant statement by voting to oppose an illegal staffing proposal and demanding a fair contract that prioritizes patient safety and local care. The registered nurses at BFMC are seeking to protect these crucial aspects by sending a strong message through their vote. This development occurred on April 14, 2026, as highlighted by PRNewswire.

data.title: DroneDash and GEODNET Launch GEODASH Aerosystems to Bring Map-Free, AI-Driven Precision Spraying to Industrial Agriculture
data.description: In Singapore, DroneDash Technologies and GEODNET have joined forces to establish GEODASH Aerosystems Pte. Ltd., a new joint venture focused on creating advanced agricultural spraying drones tailored for industrial farming. Unlike traditional models, the drones developed by this partnership do not need manual pre-mapping before each use. By utilizing real-time AI Vision technology and operating on the world’s largest decentralized GNSS-RTK network, these drones are designed to cater to large-scale farming operations. This collaboration marks a significant step towards revolutionizing agricultural drone technology and streamlining farming processes.

data.title: ReconAfrica Provides Operational Update and Reports 2025 Year-End Results
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on April 14, 2026, Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd., known as ReconAfrica, shared updates on their operations along with their financial and operational outcomes for 2025. The company, listed as TSXV: RECO, OTCQX: RECAF, Frankfurt: 0XD, NSX: REC, renewed its shelf prospectus and made all necessary filings accessible on SEDAR+ (sedarplus.ca).

data.title: Pacaso Adds Charles Street Residence to Its London Collection, Deepening Its Presence in Mayfair
data.description: In response to increasing buyer interest in shared ownership in London's coveted postal code, a prestigious residential property on a renowned Mayfair street has recently been acquired. This acquisition underscores the rising demand for co-ownership opportunities in the city's most exclusive area. The purchase was made by Pacaso, a prominent real estate platform specializing in tech-driven solutions for co-owned residences. The property's location on one of Mayfair's top residential streets highlights the allure of shared ownership in London's high-end real estate market. This development comes as more buyers seek to invest in co-ownership arrangements, reflecting a growing trend in the city's property sector. The address's prominence and the demand for such opportunities emphasize the appeal of co-ownership models in London.

data.title: Stellus Capital Investment Corporation Announces $0.34 Second Quarter 2026 Regular Dividend, Payable Monthly in Increments of $0.1133 in May, June, and July 2026
data.description: Stellus Capital Investment Corporation, a publicly traded company listed under the ticker symbol SCM on the New York Stock Exchange, recently disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a monthly dividend of $0.1133 for the months of April, May, and June. This totals to $0.34 per share for the second quarter of the fiscal year.

data.title: Stellus Private Credit BDC Announces $0.34 Second Quarter 2026 Regular Dividend, Payable Monthly in Increments of $0.1133 in April, May, and June 2026
data.description: A Houston-based company, Stellus Private Credit BDC, declared a monthly dividend of $0.1133 for April, May, and June 2026. This amounts to $0.34 per share for the second quarter. The Board of Trustees made this announcement, ensuring regular dividends for shareholders over the upcoming months.
